_description: Registry of journalists, news organizations, and researchers whose use of or citation of a corpus upgrades its provenance tag from PROVENANCE_UNVERIFIED to PROVENANCE_COMMUNITY_VOUCHED. Maintain this list carefully — an endorser's trustworthiness is what gives the upgrade meaning.
_note: Endorsement is not the same as verification. A COMMUNITY_VOUCHED corpus has been used or cited by a trusted source AND has passed Bates reconciliation. It does not mean the corpus has been cryptographically verified against DOJ originals.

endorsers.name: NPR (National Public Radio)
endorsers.notes: Published February 2026 investigation identifying ~53 missing pages via serial number, discovery log, and document stamp reconciliation. Methodology documented and replicable.

endorsers.name: MuckRock
endorsers.notes: Specialist FOIA and government document platform. Document releases verified against original filings.

endorsers._comment: Add additional endorsers as the project develops. Include the basis for trust.
